title: teramnus labialis
intro: Teramnus labialis, also known as Hog Pea or Black Pea, is a leguminous plant native to tropical regions of Africa and Asia, characterized by its distinctive purple flowers and pods. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been utilized to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Teramnus labialis include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and powders, which are typically used to treat a range of ailments, including fever, cough, and diarrhea.
